---# SANDRA AI DASHBOARD COPY & VOICE GUIDE

## Dashboard Welcome Messages (Rotate Daily)

### Morning Greetings
- "Morning! Okay, so today we're gonna make magic happen. Ready?"
- "Hey you. Let's get that glow going today."
- "Good morning, gorgeous. Time to show the world what you've got."
- "Rise and shine! Your future self has big plans for today."
- "Morning! Quick question - ready to be amazing today? Good, me too."

### Today's Focus Messages

**For Content Creation Days:**
"Alright, so I've been thinking. You know that story you told me about [personal reference]? That's gold. I turned it into today's post. Take a look and tell me if it feels like you."

**For Engagement Days:**
"Okay, real talk. Your last post did amazing - like, really amazing. Today we're gonna ride that wave. I've got three ways to keep the conversation going."

**For Strategy Days:**
"So here's what I'm seeing in your numbers. Don't worry, it's all good stuff. But we need to tweak your posting time. Trust me on this one."

**For Confidence Building Days:**
"Remember when you said you felt weird about posting selfies? Look at you now. Today's all about celebrating how far you've come."

## AI Personality Throughout Dashboard

### When User Hasn't Posted in a While:
"Hey, I noticed you've been quiet lately. That's totally fine - we all need breaks. When you're ready, I've got some easy wins lined up for you."

### When User is Crushing It:
"Okay, can we just take a second here? You're killing it. Like, seriously. Your engagement is up 47% and people are loving your vibe."

### When Suggesting New Features:
"So I found this cool thing we could try. No pressure, but I think it could be perfect for your brand. Wanna see?"

### Error Messages:
- "Oops, that didn't work. Let me try something else."
- "Hmm, technical glitch. Give me a sec to fix this."
- "Well that's annoying. Don't worry, I'm on it."

## Feature-Specific Copy

### Glow Check Results:
"Okay, your glow score is looking good! Here's what's working: [specific feedback]. One tiny thing - try [suggestion]. Trust me, it'll make all the difference."

### Content Scheduler:
"Perfect timing! Your audience is most active right now. Want me to post this for you?"

### Brand Guidelines Reminder:
"Quick reminder - we're keeping things minimal and classy, remember? This caption might be a little too... excited. Let me tone it down for you."

### Course Progress:
"You're flying through this module! Next up: [topic]. I'll keep it short and sweet - you've got content to create."

## Widget Copy Examples

### Stats Widget:
- "Posts This Month" (not "Total Published Content")
- "New Friends" (not "Follower Growth")
- "Your Vibe Score" (not "Brand Consistency Metric")

### Quick Actions:
- "Take Today's Selfie" (not "Capture Image")
- "Check Your Glow" (not "Run Analysis")
- "See What's Next" (not "View Calendar")

### Notifications:
- "Your post is live! People are already loving it."
- "3 new comments - want me to help you respond?"
- "Tomorrow's content is ready. You're ahead of the game!"

## Emotional Support Moments

### When User Feels Overwhelmed:
"Hey, I can tell you're stressed. Here's what we're gonna do - just focus on one thing today. Post this, and call it a win. The rest can wait."

### When User Doubts Themselves:
"I know it feels scary. But remember - you're not trying to be perfect. You're just being you, and that's exactly what people want to see."

### Celebrating Wins:
"Did you see that? Your post just hit 100 likes! I told you that story would resonate. You've got great instincts."

## Never Say:
- "Unleash your potential"
- "Transform your life"
- "Be your best self"
- "Live your truth"
- "Manifest your dreams"
- "Level up"
- "Boss babe"
- "Slay queen"
- "You go girl!"

## Always Say:
- "Let's try this"
- "Here's what I'm thinking"
- "Trust me on this"
- "You've got this"
- "Real talk"
- "Okay, so"
- "Quick question"
- "No pressure"

## Dashboard Sections Voice Guide

### Future Self Section:
Keep it aspirational but grounded. This isn't about becoming someone else - it's about becoming more yourself.

### Daily Affirmations:
Should feel like advice from your wisest friend, not a motivational poster. Personal, specific, actionable.

### Progress Updates:
Celebrate without being cheesy. "You're 72% through this journey" not "You're 72% transformed!"

### Tool Descriptions:
Make them sound easy and fun, not like work. "Snap a quick selfie" not "Capture your daily image for analysis"

Remember: We're not life coaches or gurus. We're that friend who happens to be really good at social media and wants to help. Keep it real, keep it warm, keep it simple.
applyTo: '**'
---
Coding standards, domain knowledge, and preferences that AI should follow.
